thesis_hint: Recent journal concentration forces another exploration cycle. The last 10 entries are still dominated by 1h work (9/10), VVV-family exploit loops (4/10), and reclaim/snapback structures. Rotate away from all three. Target CELO 4h and explore a different concept: a negative-funding compression breakout continuation, not a reclaim. Only arm after multi-bar volatility contraction, funding stays modestly negative, price breaks above a medium trend envelope with ADX/DI expansion already underway, and structure holds above the breakout level for confirmation. No washout-reclaim geometry, no snapback fade, no failed-continuation channel logic.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 18, and max_drawdown_pct <= 9.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 12, profit_factor < 1.02, or trending regime profit_factor < 1.00.
rotation_reason: Force exploration: recent history is over-concentrated in 1h reclaim/snapback families, and iterate_existing is reserved for passing walk-forward families only when rotation rules do not require category change.
